subcodes.first_line: O Ali! On this Day the very essence of proof proclaimeth that the All-Merciful is come, and all atoms bear witness to the establishment of the Ancient Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی امروز نفس برهان بانه قد اتی الرحمن ناطق و جمیع ذرات باستوای هیکل قدم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment
